title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SITIO OF MAYAMOT, BARRIO OF BANGA, MUNICIPALITY OF PLARIDEL, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, TO BAGONG SILANG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 581 / 50 OG No. 6, 2371 (June, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1005, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SITIO OF MAYAMOT, BARRIO OF BANGA, MUNICIPALITY OF PLARIDEL, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, TO BAGONG SILANG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Sitio of Mayamot in the Barrio of Banga, Municipality of Plaridel, Province of Bulacan, is changed to Bagong Silang.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
